# Suites that MUST appear when slider_pattern.cpp changes.
# These were curated from a live selector run on 2026-03-23 and only include
# suites with clear Slider or ArcSlider pages/tests in their top matched files.
# Updated 2026-04-25: removed arcslider suites — "arcslider" is a single token
# that doesn't decompose to "slider", so the selector cannot match them from
# the slider_pattern.cpp changed file.

ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_picker/ace_ets_module_picker_api11_static
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_picker/ace_ets_module_picker_api12_static
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_picker/ace_ets_module_picker_api16_static
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_dialog/ace_ets_module_dialog_Slider
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_dialog/ace_ets_module_dialog_Slider_static
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_modifier_static
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_commonAttrsDialog/ace_ets_module_commonAttrsDialog_api12_static
